title: Quickstart Templates
description: Starter templates for building onchain apps with Next.js and React — pre-wired with GoldRush Kit, TypeScript, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui so you can go from zero to a working wallet dashboard in minutes.
useCase: Clone a production-ready Next.js starter that ships with GoldRush Kit components, Tailwind styling, and TypeScript — skip boilerplate and start building your dApp immediately.
